handover_instructions.description: Template for session handovers during cloud deployment optimization. Each session creates a handover file at .agent/session-handovers/cloud-deploy-opt-<YYYYMMDD-HHMM>.json before ending.

required_fields.session_id: Unique identifier, e.g., S01, S02, etc. (matches plan phases)
required_fields.session_date: ISO date of the session, e.g., 2026-05-13
required_fields.phase_completed: Phase number (1-6) from the implementation plan
tasks_completed: Array of task IDs completed this session, e.g., ['T-001', 'T-002']
tasks_remaining: Array of task IDs remaining in this phase
required_fields.git_commit_sha: SHA of the commit created at session end
required_fields.tests_run: Which test suites were run and their results
artifacts_produced: List of files created or modified
required_fields.preconditions_for_next_session: What must be true before the next session starts
required_fields.known_issues: Any unresolved issues or blockers the next session should know about
required_fields.context_to_restore: Specific commands or state the next session should run to resume work
required_fields.model_used: Which AI model was used (sonnet, opus, haiku)

example.git_commit_message: chore: cap memory for low-RAM cloud deployment
preconditions_for_next_session: T-001 through T-005 committed and on branch cloud-deploy-opt
npm run test passes (83 tests green)
example.context_to_restore: Check out branch cloud-deploy-opt. Review lib/sharedBrowser.ts CHROMIUM_LAUNCH_ARGS. Run T-006 stress test: DRY_RUN_MODE=true npm start, poll /api/health/resources every 15 min for 2 hours.

handover_workflow: 1. Before ending session, run full test suite (npm run test)
2. Commit all changes with descriptive message
3. Record git commit SHA and test results
4. Create handover JSON in .agent/session-handovers/ with filename cloud-deploy-opt-<YYYYMMDD-HHMM>.json
6. Next session starts by reading the latest handover file, verifying preconditions, then resuming

session_preconditions_checklist.description: Every session MUST verify these before starting work:
checks: Previous session's handover file exists and tasks are completed as reported
Preconditions from previous handover are satisfied
session_preconditions_checklist.failure_behavior: If any check fails, STOP. Do not proceed with implementation. Report the issue and wait for operator guidance.
